title: Untitled document (1).pdf
summaries:
* Retenzy is an all-in-one customer retention and loyalty platform engineered primarily for growing e-commerce brands on Shopify.
* The software was founded in 2023 and is headquartered in Pune, India.
* It combines customer rewards, referral structures, and product reviews to boost customer lifetime value (LTV).
* Loyalty programs include points-based economies, tier-based VIP tracks, and custom milestones.
* Integrated review management automates the collection of text, photo, and video reviews via scheduled emails or SMS, syncing them with Google Shopping and generating SEO-rich snippets.
* The referral incentives allow businesses to create custom referral networks.

* Integrates with Google Shopping and generates SEO-rich snippets.  
* Allows businesses to create custom referral networks to turn customers into brand advocates.  
* Supports membership tiers offering perks like early access, free shipping, or special discounts.  
* Provides built-in email marketing automation flows, including welcome emails, shipping updates, abandoned cart reminders, and post-purchase follow-ups.  
* Retenzy features over 15 pre-built storefront widgets to display loyalty incentives and review sections without custom development.
